title: FsWatchEvent
description: fs.watch-event — server-pushed event emitted when a file or directory under an active fs.watch subscription changes. 'type' is the high-level operation; 'moved' populates 'old_path' with the previous location. Events are best-effort (subject to the per-connection drop-oldest backpressure in the write pump). The daemon coalesces rapid successive changes on the same path where possible.

path.description: Workspace-relative path of the file or directory that changed.

type.description: High-level change kind. 'modified' covers content changes and metadata (chmod, truncate). 'moved' is emitted for rename(2) within the watched tree.

old_path.description: For 'moved' events only: the previous workspace-relative path before the rename.
